item.title: The 2026-2027 Season of Events - 05/01/2026 12:00am EDT to 09/08/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Here it is, folks! There are still a couple of [...]
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The 2026-2027 Season of Events on May 1, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include season of events and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: ServSafe Manager Class - 07/10/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/17/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The ServSafe Manager course will be offered on July 10th and 17th. This class will consist of an instructor-led class with a 9th edition ServSafe manager textbook and online exam voucher included.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: ServSafe Manager Class on Jul 10, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include 9th edition textbook and online exam voucher.

item.title: St. Joseph Festival - 07/11/2026 12:00pm EDT to 07/12/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 36 Melmore St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for a weekend full of family fun at the St. Joseph Festival! Bring your family and friends and enjoy great food, exciting games, live entertainment, raffles, and activities for all ages. Festival Hours Saturday, July 11, 2026 | 12:00 PM – 9:00 PM Sunday, July 12, 2026 | 12:00 PM – 9:00 PM Games & Activities • Cake Wheel • Instant Bingo & BINGO • Fish Pond • Kiddie Korral • Pop Ring Toss • Dunk Tank • Over Under • Coin Toss • Ball & Barrel • Black Jack • Texas Hold'em (Adults Only) • Spartan Express Train Ride • Inflatables Raffles • Main Raffle • Super Raffle • Big 3 Raffle • 50/50 Raffles (one winner each day) Festival Favorites • World Famous Chicken Dinners (Sunday) • Homemade Chicken Noodle Soup • Bratwurst Stand • Lunch Stand featuring burgers, fries, pizza, and more • Funnel Cakes • Soda Booth Live Entertainment All Weekend We can't wait to welcome you for another unforgettable St. Joseph Festival weekend!
item.dc:creator: St. Joseph Catholic Church
item.yodel:media_alt_text: St. Joseph Festival on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include family fun and games.

item.title: Christmas in July - 07/11/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/12/2026 2:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 1700 Duchess Ln, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA DJ Biscuit is back for another round of awesomeness for a Christmas in July themed party!8p-12a!
item.dc:creator: Bel-Mar Boat Landing
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Christmas in July on Jul 11, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include dj biscuit and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Daybreak Service - 07/12/2026 8:30am EDT to 07/12/2026 9:00am EDT
item.description: Location : 131 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for Daybreak Service at Trinity United Church of Christ — a peaceful 30-minute morning gathering to start your day with reflection and community. When: March 1, 2026, 8:30 AM. Where: 131 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH. All are welcome. #DaybreakService #TrinityUCC #TiffinOH #MorningWorship #Community
item.dc:creator: Trinity United Church of Christ Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Daybreak Service on Jul 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include daybreak service and live video.

item.title: Service of the Word - 07/12/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/12/2026 11:00am EDT
item.description: Location : Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for worship, Sunday mornings at 10:00 am. In person or online via Facebook and Youtube. (search: Trinity UCC Tiffin)
item.dc:creator: Trinity United Church of Christ Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Service of the Word on Jul 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community and live video.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/12/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/12/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 92 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: The Social Cigar
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include porch geese and seasonal.

item.title: Music Industry Summer Camp - 07/12/2026 3:00pm EDT to 07/16/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 231 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us at the 27th annual Tiffin University Music Industry Summer Camp and enjoy a total creative experience in writing, performing and recording rock, pop, jazz, r&b, a cappella, hip hop and other commercial styles! You’ll also work with industry professionals on how to succeed as an independent artist and music entrepreneur! With lots of individual attention and working in small ensembles and production teams, campers each take the lead in the creation of original pop, rock, r&b and hip hop music, a cappella arrangements, and solo and group performances. Campers perform in rock, pop, hip hop and indie bands and vocal groups, receive private instruction and solo coachings, participate in workshops on songwriting, beatboxing, live looping, studio recording and production, arranging, live sound engineering, and other topics key to success on stage and in the studio. You’ll collaboratively work with professional artists-in-residence to create and record original music together. You’ll engage in co-writing activities with fellow campers and pro songwriters, and then you’ll work with a professional producer in the recording and mixing of your songs. Camp ends on Thursday evening with a public in-person and live-streamed performance of what we’ve created together! The camp is open to all high school and college students, as well as amateur and professional musicians and educators!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Music Industry Summer Camp on Jul 12, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include college students and high school students.

item.title: Middle School Robotics Summer Camp - 07/13/2026 8:00am EDT to 07/13/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get ready for an exciting day of robotics at Tiffin University! You’ll learn the basics, write simple code and work with a team to complete fun robot missions in a real university lab. No experience needed – just bring your curiosity. • Explore how robots move, respond to code and are controlled through programming. • Complete navigation, obstacle courses, accuracy tasks and timed problem-solving activities in teams. • Use hands-on robotic programming including Sphero BOLT and Dobot Magician Lite, plus see live demos of the NAO humanoid robot and Spot the robot dog. • Gain coding experience, teamwork skills, STEM exposure and celebrate the day with a mini showcase. • Open to middle school students grades 6-8.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Middle School Robotics Summer Camp on Jul 13, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include School and coding experience.

item.title: 6p | Pioneer Workshop: Candle Making - 07/13/2026 6:00pm EDT to 07/13/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA null
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 6p | Pioneer Workshop: Candle Making on Jul 13, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community events and pioneer workshop.

item.title: "Colored Pencil Cherry Pie" Tuesday, July 14, 2026 9am-12pm #07142601 - 07/14/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/14/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA In this class you will use colored pencils to create a 5"x7" drawing of a slice of cherry pie, learning about strokes and blending techniques. All supplies are provided. Preregistration is required by Friday, July 10. Minimum class size is 3 people. The cost is $45 for TAG members & $55 for non-members. Contact Mike Fink (813-695-0506), or TAG (419-443-0478), or tiffinartguild@att.net with questions. You can also stop in at the Gallery, 130 S Washington St, Tiffin between Noon and 4 pm Wednesday thru Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Colored Pencil Cherry Pie" Tuesday, July 14, 2026 9am-12pm #07142601 on Jul 14, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Classes/Workshops and art class.

item.title: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | July 14, 2026 Experience - 07/14/2026 9:00am EDT to 07/14/2026 3:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 3101 N Township Rd 47, Fostoria, OH 44830, USA BIG BOY 4014 IS COMING BACK TO FOSTORIA Union Pacific's Big Boy No. 4014 returns to Fostoria on Tuesday, July 14, 2026, for a special public display during its Coast-to-Coast Tour Eastern Leg celebrating America’s 250th anniversary! This is your opportunity to get up close to the world’s largest operating steam locomotive as thousands of visitors gather in Fostoria for this historic event and community-wide experience. Tuesday, July 14, 2026 Big Boy No. 4014 is scheduled to be on public display from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM at the Norfolk Southern Fostoria Automotive Distribution Center. Visitors will have the opportunity to experience the world’s largest operating steam locomotive up close in one of America’s most historic railroad communities. This day will be more than a train stop, it will be a community-wide experience throughout Fostoria. Visitors are encouraged to explore local restaurants, shops, attractions, special events, and experiences happening across the city as Fostoria celebrates this once-in-a-lifetime event. More information, updates, local offers, and visitor details at: http://BigBoyFostoria.com/ Experience the Legend, Experience Fostoria.
item.dc:creator: Destination Seneca County
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Big Boy 4014 Fostoria, OH | July 14, 2026 Experience on Jul 14, 2026 in Fostoria, OH. Featured themes include steam locomotive and visitors.

item.title: 10:30a | Family Storytime - 07/14/2026 10:30am EDT to 07/14/2026 11:30am EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library for “Family Storytime” on Tuesdays, July 7, 14, and 21 at 10:30 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This engaging program, part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program “Unearth a Story,” features stories, songs, rhymes, games, and activities suitable for the whole family. All ages are welcome, and no registration is required. For more information, visit the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or go to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: 10:30a | Family Storytime on Jul 14, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include stories songs rhymes games and summer reading program.

item.title: Homemade Scent Jars - Seneca Conservation District - 07/14/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join the Seneca Conservation District for the Homemade Scent Jars event. To participate, please call Allen Eiry at 419-448-9774 to sign up.
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Homemade Scent Jars - Seneca Conservation District on Jul 14, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include participate and seneca conservation district.

item.title: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! - 07/14/2026 2:00pm EDT to 07/14/2026 3:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Join us for "Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition!" at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library, happening on Tuesdays, July 7, 14, and 21 from 2:00 p.m. to 3:30 p.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. This weekly hangout is open to teens entering grades 6 through 12 and will feature games, snacks, crafts, and more, as part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program "Unearth a Story." For more details, visit http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/ or call the library at 419-447-3751.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Teen Tuesday: Summer Edition! on Jul 14, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Kids & Family and games snacks crafts.

item.title: Bloomville Lions Club Fundraiser Dinner - 07/15/2026 4:30am EDT to 07/15/2026 5:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 28 Hopewell Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Meal Includes: 2 Sandwiches - choise of Pulled Pork or Shredded Chicken (two of the same) Baked Beans, Coleslaw, Dessert. Enjoy a delicius meal while supporting a great cause!
item.dc:creator: Allen Eiry Center
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Bloomville Lions Club Fundraiser Dinner on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include pulled pork and shredded chicken.

item.title: High School Robotics Summer Camp - 07/15/2026 8:00am EDT to 07/15/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Get ready for an exciting day of robotics at Tiffin University! You’ll learn the basics, write simple code and work with a team to complete fun robot missions in a real university lab. No experience needed – just bring your curiosity. • Explore how robots move, respond to code and are controlled through programming. • Complete navigation, obstacle courses, accuracy tasks and timed problem-solving activities in teams. • Use hands-on robotic programming including Sphero BOLT and Dobot Magician Lite, plus see live demos of the NAO humanoid robot and Spot the robot dog. • Gain coding experience, teamwork skills, STEM exposure and celebrate the day with a mini showcase. • Open to high school students grades 9-12.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin University
item.yodel:media_alt_text: High School Robotics Summer Camp on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include teamwork skills and high school robotics summer camp.

item.title: Rubber Ducky Wednesday - 07/15/2026 11:00am EDT to 07/15/2026 12:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 77 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA The Youth Services Department at the Tiffin-Seneca Public Library will host “Rubber Ducky Wednesday” on Wednesdays, July 1, 8, 15, and 22 at 11:00 a.m. in the Frost Kalnow Room. Babies age birth to 35 months and their caregivers are invited to a story time on July 1, July 8, and July 15 with books, songs and lap bounces. On July 22, join the Library for a play date with toys and books for the babies to enjoy together. This program is part of the 2026 Summer Reading Program, “Unearth a Story.” For more information, stop by the Junior Library, call 419-447-3751, or log on to http://www.tiffinsenecalibrary.org/
item.dc:creator: Tiffin-Seneca Public Library
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Rubber Ducky Wednesday on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include seasonal and story time.

item.title: Collaborative Luncheon | July - 07/15/2026 11:30am EDT to 07/15/2026 1:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 168 Miami St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Welcome to the Seneca County Collaborative Luncheon series, where you have a seat at the table for a gathering filled with networking, education, promotion, and impact. On the menu… Date & Time: Wednesday, July 15, 2026 11:30 AM: Doors Open 11:30 AM - 12 PM: Networking 12 PM - 1 PM: Program Location: Tiffin University’s Osceola Theatre Featured Speaker: LeSean Shaw, CEO Actual Reality Technologies Topic: Beyond ChatGPT: Building an AI Toolkit for Everyday Success Registration: $25 for members and non-members Our luncheon series is designed to provide a comprehensive experience that embodies the mission of the Collaborative and allows our organization to best serve you. Reserve your seat today at: https://senecaregionalchamberofcommerceoh.growthzoneapp.com/ap/Events/Register/52FavZVtbCWCq Experience the Collaborative one bite at a time. See you at the luncheon!
item.dc:creator: Seneca Regional Chamber & Development
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Collaborative Luncheon | July on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include networking and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/15/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 4:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 92 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase All Summer Long MEMORIAL DAY THRU LABOR DAY Location: The City of Tiffin Get ready for a summer full of fun with Tiffin’s Wild Goose Chase, brought to you by Simply Shop Local! Spend the summer exploring Tiffin as you search for porch geese at participating local businesses throughout the city. Each stop is a chance to discover new places, support local, and enjoy a unique, interactive experience with friends and family. How It Works: 1. Pick up a paper passport at any participating business OR 2. Get your online pass here https://www.simplyshoplocal.org/blank/summer-1 • Visit participating businesses around Tiffin • Find the porch goose at each location • Locate & record the 4 digit code for each goose. • Explore, shop, and enjoy the journey all summer long Whether you’re competing to find them all or just enjoying the adventure, the Wild Goose Chase is the perfect way to experience everything Tiffin has to offer.
item.dc:creator: The Social Cigar
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer fun and tiffin wild goose chase.

item.title: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase - 07/15/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 4:00pm EDT

item.dc:creator: Shop Tiffin Ohio
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Tiffin's Wild Goose Chase on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include summer activities and support local.

item.title: Free Swim Day at the City Pool! - YLFCU - 07/15/2026 1:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 7:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 491 Coe St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Sponsored by Your Legacy Federal Credit Union, Come beat the heat for free on Wednesday, July 15th! Regular pool hours 1-7PM
item.dc:creator: Your Legacy Federal Credit Union
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Free Swim Day at the City Pool! - YLFCU on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include community event and free swim day.

item.title: Dine to Donate for CASA of SSW - 07/15/2026 4:00pm EDT to 07/15/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 69 W Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Save yourself from the "What's for dinner?" debate!

Skip the meal planning, avoid the dishes, and let Heavenly Pizza handle dinner on Wednesday, July 15, from 4–8 PM.

It's a two-for-one: your family gets a delicious meal, and 15% of sales will help CASA of SSW recruit and train volunteers to give a voice to abused and neglected children in our community.

Now that's a dinner decision you can feel good about!
item.dc:creator: CASA of SSW
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Dine to Donate for CASA of SSW on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include help children and pizza.

item.title: The Herbal Cocktail Camp - 07/15/2026 6:30pm EDT to 07/15/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 89 Jefferson St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA If your summer hosting game needs an upgrade, this is the class for you! Don't serve your friends another basic vodka soda with a sad, shriveled lime wedge! You and your reputation deserve better. Welcome to Herbal Cocktail Camp, a masterclass for cocktail enthusiasts and anyone who wants to drink their medicine with a splash of spirits. We are stripping away the pretentious mixology attitude and replacing it with plant magic, liquid alchemy, and a healthy dose of sass.
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Community Kitchen
item.yodel:media_alt_text: The Herbal Cocktail Camp on Jul 15, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include liquid alchemy and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: Christmas in July - Third Thursday in Downtown Tiffin - 07/16/2026 5:00pm EDT to 07/16/2026 8:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 96 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Stroll through downtown, enjoy the festive lights, and explore specials, sales, and unique offerings at our local shops and restaurants. Don't miss the exciting Naughty or Nice Scratch-Off Giveaway: make a purchase at participating businesses, get a scratch-off ticket, and see if you're naughty or nice! Naughty? Enter your ticket at the Welcome Center (96 S. Washington St.) for a chance to win Chamber Cash. Nice? Enjoy an exclusive prize, discount, or coupon!
item.dc:creator: Downtown Tiffin
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Christmas in July - Third Thursday in Downtown Tiffin on Jul 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include downtown tiffin and local shops.

item.title: Party in the Parking Lot - 07/16/2026 5:00pm EDT to 07/16/2026 10:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 106 E Perry St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Christmas in July starts here! Before you head to the concert at the East Green, stop by the Tiffin Elks Party in the Parking Lot! Thursday, July 16 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM Food Trucks Beer Tent DORA Friendly A little Christmas fun in the middle of summer! Bring a friend, grab a bite to eat, enjoy a cold drink, and kick off your evening with us before walking over to the concert. Tiffin Elks Lodge #94 We can’t wait to see you there! https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/tiffinelks94?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZZLPtSrx__HrPZWwBgIlZH6K8iHGvQ8kPPFv2SES4gKsbRpo226iq2Pytrnk_PCL1ypYtaBN3oiFENDBxFYBj-lozjcBPiW6RxDnz_27o_1Dkuiv9CAwJujOcU2lpakDEs_uvWW7YloCPTFUnrvnGFQ&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/partyintheparkinglot?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZZLPtSrx__HrPZWwBgIlZH6K8iHGvQ8kPPFv2SES4gKsbRpo226iq2Pytrnk_PCL1ypYtaBN3oiFENDBxFYBj-lozjcBPiW6RxDnz_27o_1Dkuiv9CAwJujOcU2lpakDEs_uvWW7YloCPTFUnrvnGFQ&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/christmasinjuly?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZZLPtSrx__HrPZWwBgIlZH6K8iHGvQ8kPPFv2SES4gKsbRpo226iq2Pytrnk_PCL1ypYtaBN3oiFENDBxFYBj-lozjcBPiW6RxDnz_27o_1Dkuiv9CAwJujOcU2lpakDEs_uvWW7YloCPTFUnrvnGFQ&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/dora?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZZLPtSrx__HrPZWwBgIlZH6K8iHGvQ8kPPFv2SES4gKsbRpo226iq2Pytrnk_PCL1ypYtaBN3oiFENDBxFYBj-lozjcBPiW6RxDnz_27o_1Dkuiv9CAwJujOcU2lpakDEs_uvWW7YloCPTFUnrvnGFQ&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/foodtrucks?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZZLPtSrx__HrPZWwBgIlZH6K8iHGvQ8kPPFv2SES4gKsbRpo226iq2Pytrnk_PCL1ypYtaBN3oiFENDBxFYBj-lozjcBPiW6RxDnz_27o_1Dkuiv9CAwJujOcU2lpakDEs_uvWW7YloCPTFUnrvnGFQ&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/beertent?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZZLPtSrx__HrPZWwBgIlZH6K8iHGvQ8kPPFv2SES4gKsbRpo226iq2Pytrnk_PCL1ypYtaBN3oiFENDBxFYBj-lozjcBPiW6RxDnz_27o_1Dkuiv9CAwJujOcU2lpakDEs_uvWW7YloCPTFUnrvnGFQ&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/tiffinohio?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZZLPtSrx__HrPZWwBgIlZH6K8iHGvQ8kPPFv2SES4gKsbRpo226iq2Pytrnk_PCL1ypYtaBN3oiFENDBxFYBj-lozjcBPiW6RxDnz_27o_1Dkuiv9CAwJujOcU2lpakDEs_uvWW7YloCPTFUnrvnGFQ&__tn__=q https://www.facebook.com/hashtag/eastgreenconcert?__eep__=6&__cft__[0]=AZZLPtSrx__HrPZWwBgIlZH6K8iHGvQ8kPPFv2SES4gKsbRpo226iq2Pytrnk_PCL1ypYtaBN3oiFENDBxFYBj-lozjcBPiW6RxDnz_27o_1Dkuiv9CAwJujOcU2lpakDEs_uvWW7YloCPTFUnrvnGFQ&__tn__=q
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Elks Lodge 94
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Party in the Parking Lot on Jul 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include beer tent and christmas in july.

item.title: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) - 07/16/2026 7:00pm EDT to 07/16/2026 9:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Park & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jul 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include free public event and thursday night tunes.

item.description: Location : 155 E Market St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA This is our concert series, free to the public. Come out and have your ears blessed, and put a smile on that face on Thursdays! Can't wait to see you!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Parks & Recreation
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Thursday Night Tunes (TNT) on Jul 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin parks recreation and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: Something Rotten! - 07/16/2026 7:30pm EDT to 07/16/2026 8:30pm EDT
item.description: Location : 30 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Music & Lyrics by Karey Kirkpatrick & Wayne Kirkpatrick Book by Karey Kirkpatrick & John O’Farrell July 16, 17, 24, 2027 – 7:30 PM July 25, 2027 – 2:00 PM A Ritz Players Production Almost, Maine is a popular play by John Cariani, a romantic comedy composed of nine interconnected short plays set in the mythical, remote town of Almost, Maine, on a cold winter night. Adults $16, Students $12 – EV, RP (Tentative audition dates: January 3 & 4, 2027) Sponsored by Reineke Family Dealerships Presented through special arrangement with Music Theatre International
item.dc:creator: The Ritz Theatre
item.yodel:media_alt_text: Something Rotten! on Jul 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include students and Seasonal & Holiday.

item.title: "Man Made" Art Show, Displayed July 1st-18th - 07/16/2026 9:00pm EDT to 07/16/2026 10:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 130 S Washington St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA AG’S MAN MADE ART SHOW The Tiffin Art Guild proudly presents the Man Made Art Show, a special exhibit celebrating the creativity, skill, and artistic vision of male artists. Created as a companion exhibit to our popular She Speaks Art Show, this exhibition provides an opportunity for men to share their unique perspectives through painting, drawing, sculpture, photography, woodworking, mixed media, and more. Whether your work is bold and powerful, thoughtful and reflective, or somewhere in between, we invite you to be part of this exciting showcase. Join us as we fill the gallery with original works that inspire conversation, celebrate creativity, and demonstrate that art knows no boundaries. We look forward to showcasing the many ways men create, imagine, and leave their mark through art. Rob Ledwedge President We are grateful to Seneca Caverns for sponsoring!!
item.dc:creator: Tiffin Art Guild
item.yodel:media_alt_text: "Man Made" Art Show, Displayed July 1st-18th on Jul 16, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include tiffin art guild and tiffin, ohio.

item.title: LIFEGUARDING COURSE - 07/17/2026 12:00am EDT to 07/19/2026 11:59pm EDT
item.description:
Location : 180 Summit St, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA

Ready to make a difference this summer? 🌊☀️

Become a certified lifeguard and gain the skills to save lives, build confidence, and become a leader!

Important Details:

JULY 17-19, 2026

Friday 4p-8p, Saturday 8a-5p, & Sunday 8a-5p

• Blended course format – 7 hours of online coursework must be completed before the first day of class

• Swim assessment required one week prior to the first class- Friday at 6pm

• Attendance is mandatory for all scheduled days (no make-up sessions)

• Registration closes one week before the class begins

• Limited to just 8 students per class – reserve your spot early!

Don’t wait—spots fill fast! 📅 Enroll now at the Tiffin Community YMCA and dive into a new opportunity!
item.dc:creator: YMCA of Bucyrus-Tiffin, Inc
item.yodel:media_alt_text: LIFEGUARDING COURSE on Jul 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. This is an all-day event with themes including lifeguarding and summer.

item.title: RobSagna Food Truck - 07/17/2026 10:00am EDT to 07/17/2026 2:00pm EDT
item.description: Location : 182 St Francis Ave, Tiffin, OH 44883, USA Come on out for some great food!
item.dc:creator: St. Francis Senior Ministries
item.yodel:media_alt_text: RobSagna Food Truck on Jul 17, 2026 in Tiffin, OH. Featured themes include Food & Drink and food truck.
